steps.canonical_text: Call emergency services now. Tell them the person is in severe breathing distress.
Keep them sitting upright and leaning slightly forward. Do not let them lie flat.
must_keep_keywords: Do not let them lie flat

steps.canonical_text: If they have a prescribed inhaler, spacer, or breathing medication, help them use it exactly as directed.
Stay with them and watch breathing closely. If they become unresponsive and stop breathing normally, start chest compressions and use an AED if one is available.
